title: panicum rufum
intro: Panicum rufum, also known as switchgrass, is a perennial grass native to North America. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Panicum rufum can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to treat various health issues.
